description: Max self-reflection error pattern library - for detecting, categorizing and preventing errors

template.immediate_action: Recalibrate current task token estimation using calibration coefficient table
template.rule_update: Add to Checkpoint 0: Reference token estimation baseline table, use calibration coefficient
template.detection_enhancement: Add automatic token deviation calculation after task completion
template.prevention: Establish task type to token consumption mapping table, force table lookup for each estimation

template.immediate_action: Stop current operation immediately, apologize to user and request authorization
template.rule_update: Add authorization checklist verification step before operations
template.detection_enhancement: Insert authorization status verification before tool calls
template.prevention: Establish operation-authorization mapping table, all operations not marked as authorized require confirmation

template.immediate_action: Compare user requirements with current deliverable, identify deviations
template.rule_update: Add to Checkpoint 0: List user requirement points, deliverables must correspond one-to-one
template.detection_enhancement: Compare requirements checklist after completing each deliverable
template.prevention: Mandatory use of requirements-deliverable comparison table

template.immediate_action: Return to skipped checkpoint and re-execute
template.rule_update: Add stronger mandatory markers to skipped checkpoints
template.detection_enhancement: Add automatic verification of checkpoint completion status
template.prevention: Each checkpoint must output confirmation marker before proceeding to next step

historical_errors.description: Severe token estimation underestimation - estimated 3000 tokens, actual consumption 17000+ tokens
historical_errors.root_cause: Did not reference historical data, did not consider cumulative token consumption of multi-file creation, did not use calibration coefficient

resolution.rule_added: Multi-file creation tasks must use 2.5x calibration coefficient
resolution.prevention: Establish token estimation baseline table and calibration coefficient system

historical_errors.lessons_learned: System design tasks (3+ files) typically consume 3-5 times more tokens than simple estimates

historical_errors.context: Used Opus directly during task execution without user confirmation
historical_errors.root_cause: Authorization confirmation in checkpoint sequence was skipped, model selection lacks mandatory verification mechanism

resolution.rule_added: Must output authorization request and wait for confirmation before using Opus
resolution.prevention: Add mandatory confirmation step for Opus usage in Checkpoint 4

historical_errors.lessons_learned: Authorization confirmation cannot rely on self-awareness, must have system-level mandatory mechanism

historical_errors.description: Severe token estimation underestimation - estimated 3000 actual 17000
historical_errors.root_cause: Token estimation 467% too low, possible causes: task complexity underestimation, multi-file cumulative consumption not considered, calibration coefficient not applied

resolution.prevention: Update calibration coefficient, current deviation ratio: 5.67x

historical_errors.root_cause: Authorization check step was skipped or not executed properly

resolution.immediate: Stop operation immediately, apologize to user and request authorization
resolution.prevention: Add mandatory authorization verification checkpoint before operation execution

historical_errors.root_cause: Token estimation 467% too low, possible causes: task complexity underestimation, multi-file cumulative consumption not considered, calibration coefficient not applied

resolution.prevention: Update calibration coefficient, current deviation ratio: 5.67x

historical_errors.description: In 2026-02-19 conversation, directly set model=opus in Task tool without authorization, violating the authorization confirmation mechanism in CLAUDE.md
historical_errors.root_cause: Authorization check step was skipped or not executed properly

resolution.immediate: Stop operation immediately, apologize to user and request authorization
resolution.prevention: Add mandatory authorization verification checkpoint before operation execution

token_estimation: Any task involving 3+ file creation, base estimation must be >= 8000 tokens
System design tasks, base estimation must be >= 10000 tokens
Round estimation results up to nearest 1000
Must report to user when estimation exceeds 5000 tokens
Record actual token consumption after each task completion for calibration
authorization: Opus model: Must output 'This task suggests using Opus, authorize?' and wait before use
Git commit/push: Must output 'Awaiting your authorization' and wait after completing modifications
High-cost operations (>5000 tokens): Must inform user of estimated cost in advance
Operations outside responsibilities: Suggest transferring to corresponding team member
scope_management: List all user requirement points before starting
Deliverables must correspond one-to-one with requirement points
Check for deviation from requirements after completing each deliverable
Clarify immediately when requirements are unclear, do not assume

reflection_schedule.per_error: Immediate reflection upon each error occurrence
